title: Terra Ascended
description: Terra Ascended is a mod that overhauls terrain to be more like certain games that focus on massive mountains and less smooth ground areas
body:
Terra Ascended — Extreme Terrain Overhaul

Terra Ascended is an early-access world generation mod that completely reworks Minecraft’s terrain to feel more expansive — with massive mountains reaching up to Y 1900

This mod focuses entirely on terrain shaping, not structures or gameplay changes.



Time Spent: 200 hours


Note - ignore the biomes that are found by /locate in the mod they are purely for a future update
